nouns.summary: Solomon is described as having “begotten” (γεννήσεν) Rehoboam.
Rehoboam is mentioned as the son whom Solomon begot.
Rehoboam is also presented as having “begotten” (γεννήσεν) Abijah.
Abijah is described as having “begotten” (γεννήσεν) Asaph.
Abijah is mentioned as the son whom Rehoboam begot.
Asaph is mentioned as the person whom Abijah begot.
